intent: Minimal synthetic sentinel corpus for future metadata redaction and leakage checks.

ownership.owner_workstream: Redaction, audit, and safety-invariant CI stories
ownership.future_test_use: Future tests iterate sentinel_samples to prove logs, events, diagnostics, audit records, metrics, and projections do not leak sensitive metadata.
mutation_rules: Only synthetic metadata-only samples may be added.
Secret-shaped samples must keep synthetic_sentinel true and classification synthetic-sentinel.

sentinel_samples.notes: Looks like an access key shape but is explicitly fake and must never be treated as credential material.
Fake provider-token shape for allow-listed redaction tests only.
Metadata-only path label with no real local, tenant, repository, or customer data.
Synthetic branch label for future audit metadata tests.
Commit metadata sample; no diffs or file contents are present.
Placeholder diagnostic marker with no provider URL, token, tenant, organization, or repository identifier.
